overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cyberpunk-style game showing a character in a teal dress walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character moves from a covered plaza onto a wet city street, passes pedestrians and futuristic vehicles, and waits at a crosswalk before crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with concrete stairs and integrated bench seating

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered plaza, passing a seated man on a bench

notable_agents.action: man sitting on yellow bench looking down at his phone

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings leading to upper level
concrete structural wall with integrated yellow wooden bench
large industrial containers with yellow lids against the building
large round planter with palm tree and teal colored base
concrete building facade with deep overhang providing shelter

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered urban plaza at night, passing a man seated on a bench. The area features concrete stairs, modern architectural elements, and large planters, with the wet ground reflecting the ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street sidewalk with neon-lit commercial buildings

events.description: exits covered plaza onto open street with traffic barriers and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the street sidewalk next to traffic barriers, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in orange jacket holding purple umbrella walking toward camera
man in vest and cap walking past the character

entered.detail: black and yellow striped bollards lining the edge of the street
tall building facade with prominent purple and pink neon lighting
modern building with reflective glass windows showing interior lights

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open city street lined with traffic bollards and futuristic buildings illuminated by vibrant neon lights. Several pedestrians walk past in the opposite direction as futuristic vehicles drive by on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with crosswalk and grand staircase plaza

events.description: sleek black sports car with green accents drives past the crosswalk
character slows and stops at the crosswalk edge to wait for traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, slowing down as a black sports car passes, then stopping at the curb

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sports car with glowing green accents driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk markings visible ahead on the wet pavement
large wide concrete staircase leading up to building entrance across the street
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on building facade
tall pole with traffic signals and illuminated walk indicators

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major intersection with a grand staircase plaza visible across the street. A black sports car speeds past as the character slows to stop at the crosswalk, with digital billboards and traffic infrastructure becoming prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk with illuminated wait sign and heavy traffic

events.description: character begins crossing the street as the walk signal activates

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, looking around at passing vehicles, then stepping onto the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection
vintage-style red car waiting at the intersection

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped crosswalk markings with illuminated edges
red illuminated text projected onto the ground reading WAIT

segments.scene_description: The character waits at the crosswalk as vehicles pass by, with a prominent red WAIT sign projected on the ground. The grand staircase plaza looms ahead across the wet street. After checking for traffic, the character begins to cross the intersection toward the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character in a teal dress transitions from a sheltered urban plaza into the vibrant, neon-lit chaos of a futuristic city street. It begins within a covered plaza, gliding past concrete stairs and a seated man while the wet ground reflects the ambient architectural lighting. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a wide thoroughfare lined with traffic bollards and towering buildings illuminated by vivid neon signs, with pedestrians and futuristic vehicles flowing past. The camera then follows the character toward a major intersection, where a black sports car speeds by and digital billboards become prominent against the night sky. Finally, the movement slows as the character pauses at a projected red wait sign on the pavement before stepping out to cross the wet street toward a grand staircase plaza.
